title: polygala houtboshiana
intro: Polygala houtboshiana, also known as Houttuynia, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Polygalaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. Its health benefits include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of the common cold. The plant is often prepared as a tea or dried herb, and can also be made into capsules or tinctures for consumption.
